---
title: "Features"
sidebar: en
---

Plume is designed as a lookup tool: categories, search, preview, favourites — everyday use needs no more.

![Categories list with hierarchical navigation.](../_screens/android-categories.png){width=320}

## Content categories

| Category | Examples |
|----------|----------|
| **Commands** | `\textbf`, `\emph`, `\section`, `\label`, `\ref`. |
| **Greek letters** | `\alpha`, `\beta`, `\Gamma`, `\Omega`. |
| **Math operators** | `\sum`, `\int`, `\prod`, `\lim`, `\partial`. |
| **Formatting** | Weights, families, sizes, lists. |
| **Environments** | `equation`, `align`, `itemize`, `enumerate`, `figure`, `table`. |
| **Bibliography** | `\cite`, `\bibliography`, `\bibliographystyle` and common BibTeX fields. |

## Modules

| Area | What it does |
|------|--------------|
| **Categories** | Hierarchical list of content. |
| **Preview** | Command, description, usage example — formatted to stay readable even for long commands. |
| **Favourites** | Marked entries stay at the top in their own view. |
| **Search** | Full-text search across every entry. |
| **Settings** | Theme (Light/Dark/System), font size. |

## Workflows

| Goal | In the app |
|------|------------|
| Insert a symbol | Search → keyword ("integral") → entry → **Copy** → switch to your editor and paste. |
| Keep a recurring command at hand | Open entry → mark as favourite → grab it later from the favourites view. |
| Learn an environment | Category "Environments" → e.g. `align` → preview shows skeleton and usage example. |

## Offline guarantee

No network activity. Content and search are fully local.

## Where to get it

| Channel | App |
|---------|-----|
| Android (APK) — development build via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-plume/releases) | Établi Plume |
| App Store (iOS) · Google Play (Android) | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid — main repository | planned — not yet available |
| Source code | [`etabli-dev/etabli-plume`](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-plume) |
